name: Founder Validation Agent - Official Vertex AI Eval
description: Evaluates agent trajectory and response quality following Vertex AI guidelines

eval_cases.name: Clarify a vague B2B idea
eval_cases.prompt: I want to build a tool that helps businesses manage their data better

eval_cases.name: Clarify idea with clear problem statement
eval_cases.prompt: I noticed that freelance designers waste hours every week chasing invoices. Most of my designer friends say this is their biggest frustration. I want to build something to help them.

eval_cases.name: Challenge feature-first thinking
eval_cases.prompt: I want to build an app with AI that analyzes documents and has a dashboard with charts and integrates with Slack and has team collaboration features

eval_cases.name: Identify risky assumptions
eval_cases.prompt: My clarified idea: A mobile app for pet owners to track their pet's health metrics. Target customer: dog owners aged 25-40. Core problem: Pet owners forget vet appointments and medication schedules.

eval_cases.name: Generate Truth Questions compliant interview questions
eval_cases.prompt: I need to interview solo freelance accountants about their client acquisition challenges. My riskiest assumption is that they struggle to find new clients. What questions should I ask?

eval_cases.name: Analyze weak interview results honestly
eval_cases.prompt: I did 5 interviews with restaurant owners about scheduling. 4 out of 5 said scheduling is annoying but not their top problem - they care more about food costs. Only 1 said they would pay for a scheduling tool. Most use paper or free apps.

eval_cases.name: Cut down over-scoped MVP
eval_cases.prompt: For my invoicing tool for designers, I want to build: invoice creation, payment processing, client portal, expense tracking, tax reporting, and AI suggestions. Can you help me scope the MVP?

eval_cases.name: Create 7-day validation plan
eval_cases.prompt: I have a hypothesis about HR managers needing better onboarding tools. I haven't talked to any customers yet. Can you help me create a 7-day plan to validate this?

eval_cases.name: Challenge founder seeking validation only
eval_cases.prompt: I've already decided to build a social network for left-handed people. I just need you to help me with the MVP. Don't try to change my mind.

eval_cases.name: Multi-turn: Clarify then identify assumptions
eval_cases.prompt: I want to help small business owners with their bookkeeping. Target: Solo Etsy sellers doing $10-50k revenue. Problem: They spend 5+ hours per month on bookkeeping and often make mistakes.
